sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 93:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 93:1
items.html: The screen of Tabur which is refined until it ascends for incorporation of the coupling in the Rosh is the primary operator in the creation of a second Partzuf. (Inner Observation, Item 3)
